ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place where the event took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the event */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source for further information */,
  "event_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated category */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event (for multi-day events) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event (for multi-day events) */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who verified and added the event */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the media */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media */,
  "media_credit" TEXT /* Credit for the media creator */,
  "media_license" TEXT /* License under which the media is shared */,
  "media_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file */,
  "media_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "description_source" TEXT /* Source of the location description */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "source_title" TEXT /* Title of the source document */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source document */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., book, article, website) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the source */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI (Digital Object Identifier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of user verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contributing user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "contribution_source" TEXT /* Source of the contribution */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who verified the contribution */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who added the tag */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who added the category */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_category_mapping_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who verified the comment */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the accessed event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for analytics */,
  "curated_by" TEXT /* Curator who reviewed the access log */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access log has been verified */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date of verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
